title: Mar Gaye Oye Loko
overview: Mar Gaye Oye Loko is an upcoming Indian-Punjabi film directed by Simerjit Singh starring Gippy Grewal, Binnu Dhillon & Sapna Pabbi. Film is releasing worldwide on 31st August 2018.
